# ShipFast v0.20.0 - Quick Start

## Install CLI
Download the appropriate package for your platform and extract:
- Windows: ShipFast-0.20.0-windows-amd64.zip (unzip, run shipfast.exe)
- macOS (Apple Silicon): ShipFast-0.20.0-darwin-arm64.tar.gz
- macOS (Intel): ShipFast-0.20.0-darwin-amd64.tar.gz
- Linux (x64): ShipFast-0.20.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz
- Linux (ARM64): ShipFast-0.20.0-linux-arm64.tar.gz

## Deploy Discovery Server (optional)
- ShipFast-Discovery-0.20.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz
- ShipFast-Discovery-0.20.0-linux-arm64.tar.gz
- ShipFast-Discovery-0.20.0-darwin-amd64.tar.gz
- ShipFast-Discovery-0.20.0-darwin-arm64.tar.gz
- ShipFast-Discovery-0.20.0-windows-amd64.zip

## Deploy Agent (optional)
- ShipFast-Agent-0.20.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz
- ShipFast-Agent-0.20.0-linux-arm64.tar.gz

## Verify
Check SHA256SUMS file for integrity verification.
